classlessGearD12A: Red poison (d4 doses, Toughness DR12 or d10 damage)
classlessGearD12B: Life elixir (d4 doses, heal d6 HP)
Small vicious dog (d6+2 HP, bite d4)
Shield (-1 damage, or break to ignore one attack)
trinkets: A tooth carved with scripture
A key with no known lock
A shard of mirror that shows another face
A bell that rings only underwater
A vial of grave dirt and silver filings
A saint's fingerbone wrapped in linen
A black coin stamped with a blind eye
A prayer strip sewn into skin
A rusted knucklebone reliquary
A tiny iron idol missing its head
A bone die with no pips
A ribbon from a saint's shroud
A child's jawbone etched with tally marks
A rusted nail from a plague coffin
A glass eye filled with black salt
A votive candle that never melts
A loop of rope from a failed hanging
A saint medal split clean in two
A tiny book of blank funeral names
A cracked hourglass full of grave sand
A spoon carved from antler and bone
A ring made from fused prayer beads
A wax-sealed letter addressed to the dead
A shard of stained glass showing no saint
A severed bell clapper wrapped in cloth
A tin whistle that only dogs answer
A dried leech in a silver vial
A copper token stamped with a weeping skull
A folded map of catacombs in red ink
A thumb-sized idol of a faceless god
A leather strip with seven knotted curses
A black feather bound to an iron pin
notes: Owes a favor to a one-eyed butcher in Galgenbeck.
Dreams nightly of a throne built from bells.
Believes they carry a prophecy carved into their scars.
Will never enter a church again after the winter purge.
Hunts the apostate who burned their kin.
Claims to hear the sea inside sealed tombs.
Has sworn to never refuse a grave-digger's request.
Keeps a tally of each night survived in charcoal marks.
Carries guilt for abandoning a sibling during the plague.
Refuses to cross running water after midnight.
Keeps a list of names spoken by the dying.
Won silver in a rigged knife game and fled before dawn.
Will trade food for gossip about ruined abbeys.
Trusts children and gravekeepers before all others.
Sleeps in armor whenever thunder rolls.
Carries a sealed apology for someone long dead.
Counts steps aloud when entering crypts.
Never kills crows, no matter the hunger.
Burned their old banner and keeps the ash.
Avoids mirrors after sunset.
Believes one omen remains unpaid from a broken vow.
Can recite every inn where they were barred.
Leaves a coin on every unmarked corpse.
Knows a smuggler's route under Galgenbeck.
Will not speak the name of their birth village.
Has seen the same black dog in three provinces.
Collects broken rosary beads from battlefields.
Insists the moon blinks when no one watches.
Keeps one empty pouch for necessary thefts.
scars: Long claw rake across the thigh
